title: BlazeRod model assimp
description: Integrate assimp into BlazeRod (and ArmorStand). Use more 3D model formats in BlazeRod and ArmorStand!
body:
This mod integrate assimp into BlazeRod and [ArmorStand](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-stand). With this mod, you can use more 3D model formats in BlazeRod and ArmorStand.

You must install this mod with ArmorStand (or BlazeRod, but BlazeRod is not published standalone currently), otherwise this mod will not work.

This mod is in early development, and not all features is implemented.
